text: The word<S>1697</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> that came to Micah<S>4318</S> the Morashtite<S>4183</S> in the days<S>3117</S> of Jotham<S>3147</S>, Ahaz<S>271</S>, and Hezekiah<S>3169</S>, kings<S>4428</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>, which he saw<S>2372</S> concerning Samaria<S>8111</S> and Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

Hear<S>8085</S>, ye peoples<S>5971</S>, all of you<S>7181</S>: hearken, O earth<S>776</S>, and all that therein<S>4393</S> is<S>136</S>: and let the Lord Jehovah<S>3069</S> be witness<S>5707</S> against you<S>136</S>, the Lord from his holy<S>6944</S> temple<S>1964</S>.
For<S>3068</S>, behold, Jehovah cometh forth<S>3318</S> out of his place<S>4725</S>, and will come down<S>3381</S>, and tread<S>1869</S> upon the high places<S>1116</S> of the earth<S>776</S>.

And the mountains<S>2022</S> shall be melted<S>4549</S> under him<S>6010</S>, and the valleys shall be cleft<S>1234</S>, as wax<S>1749</S> before<S>6440</S> the fire<S>784</S>, as waters<S>4325</S> that are poured<S>5064</S> down a steep place<S>4174</S>.

For the transgression<S>6588</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> is all this<S>2403</S>, and for the sins of the house<S>1004</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>. What is the transgression<S>6588</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>? is it not Samaria<S>8111</S>? and what are the high places<S>1116</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>? are they not Jerusalem<S>3389</S>?

Therefore I will make<S>7760</S> Samaria<S>8111</S> as a heap<S>5856</S> of the field<S>7704</S>, and as places for planting vineyards<S>3754</S>; and I will pour down<S>5064</S> the stones<S>68</S> thereof into the valley<S>1516</S>, and I will uncover<S>1540</S> the foundations thereof<S>3247</S>.

And all her graven images<S>6456</S> shall be beaten to pieces<S>3807</S>, and all her hires<S>868</S> shall be burned<S>8313</S> with fire<S>784</S>, and all her idols<S>6091</S> will I lay<S>7760</S> desolate<S>8077</S>; for of the hire<S>868</S> of a harlot<S>2181</S> hath she gathered<S>6908</S> them<S>868</S>, and unto the hire of a harlot<S>2181</S> shall they return<S>7725</S>.

For this will I lament<S>5594</S> and wail<S>5594</S>; I will go<S>3212</S> stripped<S>7758</S> and naked<S>6174</S>; I will make<S>6213</S> a wailing<S>4553</S> like the jackals<S>8577</S>, and a lamentation<S>60</S> like the ostriches<S>1323</S>.

For her wounds<S>4347</S> are incurable<S>605</S>; for it is come<S>935</S> even unto Judah<S>3063</S>; it reacheth<S>5060</S> unto the gate<S>8179</S> of my people<S>5971</S>, even to Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.
Tell<S>5046</S> it not in Gath<S>1661</S>, weep<S>1058</S> not at all<S>1058</S>: at Beth-le<S>1036</S>-aphrah have I rolled<S>6428</S> myself in the dust<S>6083</S>.

Pass away<S>5674</S>, O inhabitant<S>3427</S> of Shaphir<S>8208</S>, in nakedness<S>6181</S> and shame<S>1322</S>: the inhabitant<S>3427</S> of Zaanan<S>6630</S> is not come forth<S>3318</S>; the wailing<S>4553</S> of Beth-ezel<S>1018</S> shall take<S>3947</S> from you the stay thereof<S>5979</S>.

For the inhabitant<S>3427</S> of Maroth<S>4796</S> waiteth anxiously<S>2342</S> for good<S>2896</S>, because evil<S>7451</S> is come down<S>3381</S> from Jehovah<S>3068</S> unto the gate<S>8179</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

Bind<S>7573</S> the chariot<S>4818</S> to the swift steed<S>7409</S>, O inhabitant<S>3427</S> of Lachish<S>3923</S>: she was the beginning<S>7225</S> of sin<S>2403</S> to the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>; for the transgressions<S>6588</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> were found in thee<S>4672</S>.

Therefore shalt thou give<S>5414</S> a parting gift<S>7964</S> to Moresheth-gath<S>4182</S>: the houses<S>1004</S> of Achzib<S>392</S> shall be a deceitful thing<S>391</S> unto the kings<S>4428</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>.

I will yet bring<S>935</S> unto thee<S>3427</S>, O inhabitant of Mareshah<S>4762</S>, him<S>3423</S> that shall possess thee<S>3519</S>: the glory of Israel<S>3478</S> shall come<S>935</S> even unto Adullam<S>5725</S>.

Make thee bald<S>7139</S>, and cut off<S>1494</S> thy hair for the children<S>1121</S> of thy delight<S>8588</S>: enlarge<S>7337</S> thy baldness<S>7144</S> as the eagle<S>5404</S>; for they are gone into captivity from thee<S>1540</S>.

Woe<S>1945</S> to them that devise<S>2803</S> iniquity<S>205</S> and work<S>6466</S> evil<S>7451</S> upon their beds<S>4904</S>! when the morning<S>1242</S> is light<S>216</S>, they practise<S>6213</S> it<S>3426</S>, because it is in the power<S>410</S> of their hand<S>3027</S>.

And they covet<S>2530</S> fields<S>7704</S>, and seize<S>1497</S> them<S>1004</S>; and houses, and take them away<S>5375</S>: and they oppress<S>6231</S> a man<S>1397</S> and his house<S>1004</S>, even a man<S>376</S> and his heritage<S>5159</S>.

Therefore thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: Behold<S>4940</S>, against this family do I devise<S>2803</S> an evil<S>7451</S>, from which ye shall not remove<S>4185</S> your necks<S>6677</S>, neither shall ye walk<S>3212</S> haughtily<S>7317</S>; for it is an evil<S>7451</S> time<S>6256</S>.

In that day<S>3117</S> shall they take up<S>5375</S> a parable<S>4912</S> against you<S>5091</S>, and lament with a doleful<S>5093</S> lamentation<S>5092</S>, and say<S>559</S>, We are utterly<S>7703</S> ruined<S>7703</S>: he changeth<S>4171</S> the portion<S>2506</S> of my people<S>5971</S>: how doth he remove<S>4185</S> it from me<S>7725</S>! to the rebellious he divideth<S>2505</S> our fields<S>7704</S>.
Therefore thou shalt have none that shall cast<S>7993</S> the line<S>2256</S> by lot<S>1486</S> in the assembly<S>6951</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>.
Prophesy<S>5197</S> ye not<S>5197</S>, thus they prophesy. They shall not prophesy<S>5197</S> to these<S>3639</S>: reproaches shall not depart<S>5253</S>.

Shall it be said<S>559</S>, O house<S>1004</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>, Is the Spirit<S>7307</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> straitened<S>7114</S>? are these his doings<S>4611</S>? Do not my words<S>1697</S> do good<S>3190</S> to him that walketh<S>1980</S> uprightly<S>3477</S>?

But of late<S>865</S> my people<S>5971</S> is risen up<S>6965</S> as an enemy<S>341</S>: ye strip<S>6584</S> the robe<S>145</S> from off<S>4136</S> the garment<S>8008</S> from them that pass<S>5674</S> by securely<S>983</S> as men averse<S>7725</S> from war<S>4421</S>.

The women<S>802</S> of my people<S>5971</S> ye cast out<S>1644</S> from their pleasant<S>8588</S> houses<S>1004</S>; from their young children<S>5768</S> ye take away<S>3947</S> my glory<S>1926</S> for ever<S>5769</S>.

Arise<S>6965</S> ye<S>3212</S>, and depart; for this is not your resting-place<S>4496</S>; because of uncleanness<S>2930</S> that destroyeth<S>2254</S>, even with a grievous<S>4834</S> destruction<S>2254</S>.

If<S>3863</S> a man<S>376</S> walking<S>1980</S> in a spirit<S>7307</S> of falsehood<S>8267</S> do lie<S>3576</S>, saying<S>5197</S>, I will prophesy unto thee of wine<S>3196</S> and of strong drink<S>7941</S>; he shall even be the prophet<S>5197</S> of this people<S>5971</S>.

I will surely<S>622</S> assemble<S>622</S>, O Jacob<S>3290</S>, all of thee<S>6908</S>; I will surely gather<S>6908</S> the remnant<S>7611</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>; I will put<S>7760</S> them together<S>3162</S> as the sheep<S>6629</S> of Bozrah<S>1223</S>, as a flock<S>5739</S> in the midst<S>8432</S> of their pasture<S>1699</S>; they shall make great noise<S>1949</S> by reason of the multitude of men<S>120</S>.

The breaker<S>6555</S> is gone up<S>5927</S> before<S>6440</S> them<S>6555</S>: they have broken forth and passed on<S>5674</S> to the gate<S>8179</S>, and are gone out<S>3318</S> thereat<S>4428</S>; and their king is passed<S>5674</S> on before<S>6440</S> them<S>3068</S>, and Jehovah at the head of them<S>7218</S>.

And I said<S>559</S>, Hear<S>8085</S>, I pray you<S>7218</S>, ye heads of Jacob<S>3290</S>, and rulers<S>7101</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>: is it not for you to know<S>3045</S> justice<S>4941</S>?

ye who hate<S>8130</S> the good<S>2896</S>, and love<S>157</S> the evil<S>7451</S>; who pluck off<S>1497</S> their skin<S>5785</S> from off them<S>7607</S>, and their flesh from off their bones<S>6106</S>;

who also eat<S>398</S> the flesh<S>7607</S> of my people<S>5971</S>, and flay<S>6584</S> their skin<S>5785</S> from off them<S>6476</S>, and break their bones<S>6106</S>, and chop them in pieces<S>6566</S>, as for the pot<S>5518</S>, and as flesh<S>1320</S> within<S>8432</S> the caldron<S>7037</S>.

Then shall they cry<S>2199</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S>, but he will not answer<S>6030</S> them<S>5641</S>; yea, he will hide his face<S>6440</S> from them at that time<S>6256</S>, according as they have wrought evil<S>7489</S> in their doings<S>4611</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> concerning the prophets<S>5030</S> that make my people<S>5971</S> to err<S>8582</S>; that bite<S>5391</S> with their teeth<S>8127</S>, and cry<S>7121</S>, Peace<S>7965</S>; and whoso putteth<S>5414</S> not into their mouths<S>6310</S>, they even prepare<S>6942</S> war against him<S>4421</S>:

Therefore it shall be night<S>3915</S> unto you<S>2377</S>, that ye shall have no vision; and it shall be dark<S>2821</S> unto you<S>7080</S>, that ye shall not divine; and the sun<S>8121</S> shall go down<S>935</S> upon the prophets<S>5030</S>, and the day<S>3117</S> shall be black over them<S>6937</S>.

And the seers<S>2374</S> shall be put to shame<S>2659</S>, and the diviners<S>7080</S> confounded<S>954</S>; yea<S>5844</S>, they shall all cover their lips<S>8222</S>; for there is no answer<S>4617</S> of God<S>430</S>.

But as<S>199</S> for me<S>4390</S>, I am full of power<S>3581</S> by the Spirit<S>7307</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and of judgment<S>4941</S>, and of might<S>1369</S>, to declare<S>5046</S> unto Jacob<S>3290</S> his transgression<S>6588</S>, and to Israel<S>3478</S> his sin<S>2403</S>.

Hear<S>8085</S> this<S>7218</S>, I pray you, ye heads of the house<S>1004</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>, and rulers<S>7101</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, that abhor<S>8581</S> justice<S>4941</S>, and pervert<S>6140</S> all equity<S>3477</S>.
They build up<S>1129</S> Zion<S>6726</S> with blood<S>1818</S>, and Jerusalem<S>3389</S> with iniquity<S>5766</S>.

The heads<S>7218</S> thereof judge<S>8199</S> for reward<S>7810</S>, and the priests<S>3548</S> thereof teach<S>3384</S> for hire<S>4242</S>, and the prophets<S>5030</S> thereof divine<S>7080</S> for money<S>3701</S>: yet they lean<S>8172</S> upon Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and say<S>559</S>, Is not Jehovah<S>3068</S> in the midst<S>7130</S> of us<S>7451</S>? no evil shall come upon us<S>935</S>.

Therefore shall Zion<S>6726</S> for your sake<S>1558</S> be plowed<S>2790</S> as a field<S>7704</S>, and Jerusalem<S>3389</S> shall become heaps<S>5856</S>, and the mountain<S>2022</S> of the house<S>1004</S> as the high places<S>1116</S> of a forest<S>3293</S>.

But in the latter<S>319</S> days<S>3117</S> it shall come to pass<S>2022</S>, that the mountain of Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s house<S>1004</S> shall be established<S>3559</S> on the top<S>7218</S> of the mountains<S>2022</S>, and it shall be exalted<S>5375</S> above the hills<S>1389</S>; and peoples<S>5971</S> shall flow unto it<S>5102</S>.

And many<S>7227</S> nations<S>1471</S> shall go<S>1980</S> and say<S>559</S>, Come<S>3212</S> ye<S>5927</S>, and let us go up to the mountain<S>2022</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and to the house<S>1004</S> of the God<S>430</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>; and he will teach<S>3384</S> us of his ways<S>1870</S>, and we will walk<S>3212</S> in his paths<S>734</S>. For out of Zion<S>6726</S> shall go forth<S>3318</S> the law<S>8451</S>, and the word<S>1697</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> from Jerusalem<S>3389</S>;

and he will judge<S>8199</S> between many<S>7227</S> peoples<S>5971</S>, and will decide<S>3198</S> concerning strong<S>6099</S> nations<S>1471</S> afar off<S>7350</S>: and they shall beat<S>3807</S> their swords<S>2719</S> into plowshares<S>855</S>, and their spears<S>2595</S> into pruning-hooks<S>4211</S>; nation<S>1471</S> shall not lift up<S>5375</S> sword<S>2719</S> against nation<S>1471</S>, neither shall they learn<S>3925</S> war any more<S>4421</S>.

But they shall sit<S>3427</S> every man<S>376</S> under his vine<S>1612</S> and under his fig-tree<S>8384</S>; and none shall make them afraid<S>2729</S>: for the mouth<S>6310</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S> hath spoken it<S>1696</S>.

For all the peoples<S>5971</S> walk<S>3212</S> every one<S>376</S> in the name<S>8034</S> of his god<S>430</S>; and we will walk<S>3212</S> in the name<S>8034</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> our God<S>430</S> for ever<S>5769</S> and ever<S>5703</S>.

In that day<S>3117</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>, will I assemble<S>622</S> that which is lame<S>6760</S>, and I will gather<S>6908</S> that which is driven away<S>5080</S>, and that which I have afflicted<S>7489</S>;

and I will make<S>7760</S> that which was lame<S>6760</S> a remnant<S>7611</S>, and that which was cast far off<S>1972</S> a strong<S>6099</S> nation<S>1471</S>: and Jehovah<S>3068</S> will reign<S>4427</S> over them in mount<S>2022</S> Zion<S>6726</S> from henceforth even for<S>5704</S> ever<S>5769</S>.

And thou<S>4026</S>, O tower of the flock<S>5739</S>, the hill<S>6076</S> of the daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>, unto thee shall it come<S>857</S>, yea<S>7223</S>, the former dominion<S>4475</S> shall come<S>935</S>, the kingdom<S>4467</S> of the daughter<S>1323</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

Now why dost thou cry<S>7321</S> out aloud<S>7452</S>? Is there no king<S>4428</S> in thee<S>3289</S>, is thy counsellor perished<S>6</S>, that pangs<S>2427</S> have taken<S>2388</S> hold of thee as of a woman in travail<S>3205</S>?

Be in pain<S>2342</S>, and labor to bring forth<S>1518</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>, like a woman in travail<S>3205</S>; for now shalt thou go forth<S>3318</S> out<S>3318</S> of the city<S>7151</S>, and shalt dwell<S>7931</S> in the field<S>7704</S>, and shalt come even unto Babylon<S>894</S>: there shalt thou be rescued<S>5337</S>; there will Jehovah<S>3068</S> redeem<S>1350</S> thee from the hand<S>3709</S> of thine enemies<S>341</S>.

And now many<S>7227</S> nations<S>1471</S> are assembled<S>622</S> against thee<S>559</S>, that say, Let her be defiled<S>2610</S>, and let our eye<S>5869</S> see<S>2372</S> our desire upon Zion<S>6726</S>.

But they know<S>3045</S> not the thoughts<S>4284</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, neither understand<S>995</S> they his counsel<S>6098</S>; for he hath gathered<S>6908</S> them as the sheaves<S>5995</S> to the threshing-floor<S>1637</S>.

Arise<S>6965</S> and thresh<S>1758</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of Zion<S>6726</S>; for I will make<S>7760</S> thy horn<S>7161</S> iron<S>1270</S>, and I will make<S>7760</S> thy hoofs<S>6541</S> brass<S>5154</S>; and thou shalt beat in pieces<S>1854</S> many<S>7227</S> peoples<S>5971</S>: and I will devote<S>2763</S> their gain<S>1215</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and their substance<S>2428</S> unto the Lord<S>3068</S> of the whole earth<S>776</S>.

Now shalt thou gather<S>1413</S> thyself in troops<S>1416</S>, O daughter<S>1323</S> of troops<S>1416</S>: he hath laid<S>7760</S> siege<S>4692</S> against us<S>5221</S>; they shall smite the judge<S>8199</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> with a rod<S>7626</S> upon the cheek<S>3895</S>.

But thou<S>1035</S>, Beth-lehem Ephrathah<S>672</S>, which art little<S>6810</S> to be among the thousands<S>505</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>, out of thee shall one come forth<S>3318</S> unto me that is to be ruler<S>4910</S> in Israel<S>3478</S>; whose goings forth<S>4163</S> are from of old<S>6924</S>, from everlasting<S>3117</S>.

Therefore will he give them up<S>5414</S>, until the time<S>6256</S> that she who travaileth<S>3205</S> hath brought forth<S>3205</S>: then the residue<S>3499</S> of his brethren<S>251</S> shall return<S>7725</S> unto the children<S>1121</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>.

And he shall stand<S>5975</S>, and shall feed<S>7462</S> his flock in the strength<S>5797</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, in the majesty<S>1347</S> of the name<S>8034</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> his God<S>430</S>: and they shall abide<S>3427</S>; for now shall he be great<S>1431</S> unto the ends<S>657</S> of the earth<S>776</S>.

And this man shall be our peace<S>7965</S>. When the Assyrian<S>804</S> shall come<S>935</S> into our land<S>776</S>, and when he shall tread<S>1869</S> in our palaces<S>759</S>, then shall we raise<S>6965</S> against him seven<S>7651</S> shepherds<S>7462</S>, and eight<S>8083</S> principal<S>5257</S> men<S>120</S>.

And they shall waste<S>7462</S> the land<S>776</S> of Assyria<S>804</S> with the sword<S>2719</S>, and the land<S>776</S> of Nimrod<S>5248</S> in the entrances<S>6607</S> thereof<S>5337</S>: and he shall deliver us from the Assyrian<S>804</S>, when he cometh<S>935</S> into our land<S>776</S>, and when he treadeth<S>1869</S> within our border<S>1366</S>.

And the remnant<S>7611</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> shall be in the midst<S>7130</S> of many<S>7227</S> peoples<S>5971</S> as dew<S>2919</S> from Jehovah<S>3068</S>, as showers<S>7241</S> upon the grass<S>6212</S>, that tarry<S>6960</S> not for man<S>376</S>, nor wait<S>3176</S> for the sons<S>1121</S> of men<S>120</S>.

And the remnant<S>7611</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> shall be among the nations<S>1471</S>, in the midst<S>7130</S> of many<S>7227</S> peoples<S>5971</S>, as a lion<S>738</S> among the beasts<S>929</S> of the forest<S>3293</S>, as a young lion<S>3715</S> among the flocks<S>5739</S> of sheep<S>6629</S>; who<S>5674</S>, if he go through, treadeth down<S>7429</S> and teareth in pieces<S>2963</S>, and there is none to deliver<S>5337</S>.
Let thy hand<S>3027</S> be lifted up<S>7311</S> above thine adversaries<S>6862</S>, and let all thine enemies<S>341</S> be cut off<S>3772</S>.

And it shall come to pass in that day<S>3117</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>, that I will cut off<S>3772</S> thy horses<S>5483</S> out of the midst<S>7130</S> of thee<S>6</S>, and will destroy thy chariots<S>4818</S>:
and I will cut off<S>3772</S> the cities<S>6145</S> of thy land<S>776</S>, and will throw down<S>2040</S> all thy strongholds<S>4013</S>.
And I will cut off<S>3772</S> witchcrafts<S>3785</S> out of thy hand<S>3027</S>; and thou shalt have no more soothsayers<S>6049</S>:
